news.title:
IREDA signs JPY 28B (~USD 210M) ECB facility with Sumitomo Mitsui.
Agreement includes a Green Shoe Option of JPY 12B; loan tenure is 5 years.
news.summary:
IREDA signs JPY 28B (~USD 210M) ECB facility with Sumitomo Mitsui.
Agreement includes a Green Shoe Option of JPY 12B; loan tenure is 5 years.

news.title:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency declared 6 dividend, ex-date April 2, 2026.
Despite dividend, total returns remain negative, reflecting poor price performance.
news.summary:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency declared 6 dividend, ex-date April 2, 2026.
Despite dividend, total returns remain negative, reflecting poor price performance.

news.title:
Reliance denies reports on Iranian oil; LIC faces income tax demand order challenge.
Infosys acquires Optimum Healthcare IT; IREDA, Chennai Petroleum announce dividends.
news.summary:
Reliance denies reports on Iranian oil; LIC faces income tax demand order challenge.
Infosys acquires Optimum Healthcare IT; IREDA, Chennai Petroleum announce dividends.

news.title:
IREDA approves Rs 0.60/share interim dividend, reflecting financial strength for FY25-26.
SECL wins Water Management Award for transforming mine water into a lifeline for communities.
news.summary:
IREDA approves Rs 0.60/share interim dividend, reflecting financial strength for FY25-26.
SECL wins Water Management Award for transforming mine water into a lifeline for communities.

news.title:
IREDA board declares interim dividend of Rs 0.60/share on Rs 10 face value.
Record date is April 2, 2026; payment via electronic mode within 30 days.
news.summary:
IREDA board declares interim dividend of Rs 0.60/share on Rs 10 face value.
Record date is April 2, 2026; payment via electronic mode within 30 days.

news.title:
IREDA board approves enhanced borrowing plan for FY26.
Market borrowing program for FY27 also gets board approval.
news.summary:
IREDA board approves enhanced borrowing plan for FY26.
Market borrowing program for FY27 also gets board approval.

news.title: IREDA to review proposal for interim dividend declaration on March 25.
news.summary: IREDA to review proposal for interim dividend declaration on March 25.

news.title:
IREDA board meeting scheduled on March 25, 2026, to consider interim dividend proposal.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post-meeting; closure started March 12, 2026.
news.summary:
IREDA board meeting scheduled on March 25, 2026, to consider interim dividend proposal.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post-meeting; closure started March 12, 2026.

news.title:
IREDA board raised FY25-26 borrowing limit to ₹35,800 Cr from ₹30,800 Cr.
Plans to raise ₹40,000 Cr in FY26-27 via bonds, loans, ECBs, and credit lines.
news.summary:
IREDA board raised FY25-26 borrowing limit to ₹35,800 Cr from ₹30,800 Cr.
Plans to raise ₹40,000 Cr in FY26-27 via bonds, loans, ECBs, and credit lines.

news.title: IREDA approved to raise up to ₹29.94B via share sale to strengthen capital.
news.summary: IREDA approved to raise up to ₹29.94B via share sale to strengthen capital.

news.title:
IREDA's board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, to consider raising Rs 2,994 Cr via QIP.
Trading window closed till 48 hours post-meeting; details on IREDA's website.
news.summary:
IREDA's board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, to consider raising Rs 2,994 Cr via QIP.
Trading window closed till 48 hours post-meeting; details on IREDA's website.

news.title: Govt allocates ₹40,064 Cr to IREDA for FY26-27, up from ₹34,730 Cr in FY25-26.
news.summary: Govt allocates ₹40,064 Cr to IREDA for FY26-27, up from ₹34,730 Cr in FY25-26.

news.title:
IREDA's subsidiary Iggelfil approves its first international green energy loan.
This marks a major step in advancing global sustainable energy initiatives.
news.summary:
IREDA's subsidiary Iggelfil approves its first international green energy loan.
This marks a major step in advancing global sustainable energy initiatives.

news.title:
IREDA sanctions its first international loan of USD 22.5M to Swarna Solar Ltd.
The loan supports a 100 MW solar plant in Zambia, boosting global green energy financing.
news.summary:
IREDA sanctions its first international loan of USD 22.5M to Swarna Solar Ltd.
The loan supports a 100 MW solar plant in Zambia, boosting global green energy financing.

news.title:
IREDA disclosed no material deviations in fund utilization for the Dec 2025 quarter.
Funds raised are intended for RE projects and general corporate purposes.
news.summary:
IREDA disclosed no material deviations in fund utilization for the Dec 2025 quarter.
Funds raised are intended for RE projects and general corporate purposes.

news.title:
IREDA exceeded market expectations in Q3, showing strong growth driven by renewable energy investments and improved asset quality.
DMart also reported better-than-expected Q3 performance, surprising investors positively.
news.summary:
IREDA exceeded market expectations in Q3, showing strong growth driven by renewable energy investments and improved asset quality.
DMart also reported better-than-expected Q3 performance, surprising investors positively.

news.title:
Ireda shares rose 4.1% on BSE, hitting ₹142.3 intra-day high.
Q3 results showed 38% PAT growth, 27% revenue increase.
news.summary:
Ireda shares rose 4.1% on BSE, hitting ₹142.3 intra-day high.
Q3 results showed 38% PAT growth, 27% revenue increase.

news.title:
IREDA's Q3 GNPA is expected at 3.75%, improving from 3.97% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 is projected to drop to 1.68% from 1.97% QoQ.
news.summary:
IREDA's Q3 GNPA is expected at 3.75%, improving from 3.97% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 is projected to drop to 1.68% from 1.97% QoQ.

news.title:
IREDA Q3 audit reveals 400.24 cr loans in Stage II per court orders.
Capital Adequacy Ratio revised to 15.52%; 9M profit at 1381.36 cr.
news.summary:
IREDA Q3 audit reveals 400.24 cr loans in Stage II per court orders.
Capital Adequacy Ratio revised to 15.52%; 9M profit at 1381.36 cr.

news.title:
IREDA's auditors gave an unmodified opinion on Dec 31, 2025, financials.
Loans of ₹400.2 Cr recognized as standard; CRAR restated to 15.5% per RBI.
news.summary:
IREDA's auditors gave an unmodified opinion on Dec 31, 2025, financials.
Loans of ₹400.2 Cr recognized as standard; CRAR restated to 15.5% per RBI.
